query:
-- Verificar o valor exato do batch e outros campos do inventory 510001
SELECT id, productId, locationId, tenantId, quantity, status, 
       batch, LENGTH(batch) as batchLen, 
       CASE WHEN batch IS NULL THEN 'NULL' WHEN batch = '' THEN 'EMPTY_STRING' ELSE batch END as batchType,
       uniqueCode, locationZone
FROM inventory
WHERE id = 510001;

-- Verificar se o batch do inventory é NULL ou string vazia
SELECT id, productId, batch IS NULL as isNull, batch = '' as isEmpty, batch
FROM inventory
WHERE productId = 210001 AND locationId = 30353;
